# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: web
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: application-stack
spec:
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: web
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: application-stack
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web
          image: your-registry/your-web-image:your-tag
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_SERVERS
              value: memcached:11211
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /readyz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: worker
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: application-stack
spec:
  replicas: 2
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: worker
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: application-stack
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: worker
          image: your-registry/your-worker-image:your-tag
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_SERVERS
              value: memcached:11211
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: memcached
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: application-stack
spec:
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: memcached
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: application-stack
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:1.6-alpine
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: memcache
              containerPort: 11211
          args:
            - "-m"
            - "256"
            - "-o"
            - "modern"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 50m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: memcache
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: memcache
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 2
            failureThreshold: 3
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: memcached
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: application-stack
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: memcached
  ports:
    - name: memcache
      port: 11211
      targetPort: memcache
